subjid.description: Patient Identification Number (PIN). May not uniquely identify a patient.

dataset_id.description: Study ID that patient belongs to.

event_id.description: ID code to link different attributes which relate to the same event (e.g. medication being administered) together.

attribute.description: Name of the attribute/event being recorded (e.g. temperature, blood pressure, etc.).  Where an attribute with the same or substantially similar semantics exist in ARC, that attribute name must be used.

attribute_unit.description: Unit of the attribute being recorded (e.g. 'mg/dL'). Null if the attribute has no unit.

arcver.description: ARC version used to generate the CRF. Null if not generated from ARC.

value.description: String data associated with the attribute.

value_num.description: Value of numerical measurements, e.g. temperature, BP.

duration.description: Duration of the event in days.

attribute_status.description: Use to indicate missing data and the reason for missingness. 'VAL' indicates that the data was collected and is present in the 'value' or 'value_num' field.
